Every trade. Every result. Nothing hidden.

ANNY logs every decision — hashed and timestamped, never rewritten.

Plan entries and exits with clear risk context. Connect with Telegram or log in to your existing account.

Log in with Telegram

Use the same account as the ANNY bot.

or use your existing account
Log in
Create your invited account

After signup, your member access will wait for admin approval.

Interested in early access?

Leave your email. We’ll only use it for ANNY access and product updates.

1Configure entry / exit plan

Explore an entry/exit plan over historical Binance candles. Results estimate maker-first entries and taker exits; no orders are placed.

2Review paper assessment
—

3Launch & confirm

Review the proposed testnet order. Nothing is placed until you confirm.

          Binance API keys
          
Add profiles (testnet, live) and pick the active one. Tick only Enable Reading + Enable Futures — leave Withdrawals and everything else off. Testnet (Demo) keys must be created at demo.binance.com → API Management (separate from your real account — they can't be used together).

          

            ➕ Create demo (testnet) API key ↗
            Create live API key ↗
          

          

          
          

            
            
          

          
          
          

          

        

        

          🤖 Your AI key (optional)
          
Bring your own LLM key so "Let AI pick the side" runs on your quota — free, no limits from us. Otherwise it uses the shared server AI.

          

          
          
          
          
          

          

        

        

          🛡 Members
          
Everyone who signed in — approve, promote, or revoke. Copy a tg:id below for the manual forms.

          
Loading…

          Early-access interests
          
Approve an interest to send a signup link. New accounts still wait in Members for final approval.

          👥 Community
          
Proof real members make this work — by their own style. Probability, not signals. Not financial advice.

          🔥 Coins members are winning on
          
⭐ = community edge (proven win-rate). A probability of past success, not a buy signal.

          

        

      

      

        ANNY provides analytical tools and execution automation. It does not guarantee profits and should not be considered financial or investment advice. Trading digital assets involves substantial risk. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
      

    


    
    

      
      
      
      
      
    


    


    
    

      

        
Mission Replay

        
A step-by-step recap of exactly how ANNY reached this decision — signal → direction → entry/exit → result → the tamper-proof hash. Proof, not a redo.
